title: SanlamAllianz takes Financial Education to Lagos Markets - FinancialEDGE
description: Insurance giants, SanlamAllianz has launched a financial education campaign at select markets in Lagos. The campaign is aimed at aiding the financial knowledge and management of traders, shop owners etc in popular markets in Lagos. Planned for two phases including a physical market activation across organised market associations in both Lagos Mainland and Lagos Island;
html: Insurance giants, SanlamAllianz has launched a financial education campaign at select markets in Lagos.
